articles.author: Nick Lichtenberg
articles.title: The week the AI scare turned real and America realized maybe it isn't ready for what's coming - Fortune
articles.description: From the "Ghost GDP" to mass layoffs at tech companies, this was the week AI's new collar economy took full effect.
articles.content: For months, the threat of artificial intelligence (AI) replacing human workers has hovered over the American economy like a distant storm. But this week, the storm made landfall, as viral doomsday es… [+13063 chars]
